name: CheckResponse
description: Structure of the response returned by GET /api/v2/check, describing the abuse data for a single IP address.

ipAddress.description: The IPv4 or IPv6 address that was queried.

isPublic.description: Whether the address is publicly routable.

isWhitelisted.description: Whether the IP appears on any AbuseIPDB whitelist.

abuseConfidenceScore.description: Confidence (0-100) that the IP is malicious.

usageType.description: Reported usage type (e.g., Data Center, Residential).

domain.description: Primary domain associated with the IP.

hostnames.description: Reverse DNS hostnames seen for the IP.

isTor.description: Whether the IP is a known Tor exit node.

totalReports.description: Total reports against this IP within the requested window.

lastReportedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent report.
